```xml
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>LiteLLM configuration maps Claude models to local Ollama instances</title>
  <subtitle>Claude Code configured to route API calls to local Ollama models instead of Anthropic's API</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>litellm_config.yaml aliases claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 to ollama/llama3.2:3b for fast/cheap operations</fact>
    <fact>claude-sonnet-4-6 aliases to ollama/deepseek-coder:6.7b for coding tasks</fact>
    <fact>claude-opus-4-6 aliases to ollama/deepseek-r1:7b for reasoning workloads</fact>
    <fact>Configuration includes 600s request timeout, 2 retries, and drop_params: true for compatibility</fact>
    <fact>The 500 error occurred because llama3.2:3b model does not support extended thinking mode</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The system uses LiteLLM as a proxy layer to redirect Claude Code's API requests to local Ollama models running on localhost:11434. This configuration enables offline development by mapping Claude's expected model names (haiku, sonnet, opus) to appropriate local alternatives. The haiku tier uses llama3.2:3b for speed, sonnet uses deepseek-coder for coding capabilities, and opus uses deepseek-r1 for complex reasoning. The configuration includes compatibility settings like drop_params to handle parameter mismatches between Claude's API and Ollama models. The error message revealed that llama3.2:3b lacks support for extended thinking features that some Claude Code operations may request.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>gotcha</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
    <file>.claude/litellm_config.yaml</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```

content.thinking:
Now I can see the fix that was applied! The user edited the litellm_config.yaml file to add `model_info: supports_reasoning: false` to all Claude model aliases.

This is a bugfix - addressing the error where llama3.2:3b doesn't support thinking/reasoning mode. By explicitly declaring `supports_reasoning: false` in the model_info section for all the Ollama model mappings, the system will know not to send reasoning/thinking requests to these models.

Key facts:
- Added model_info.supports_reasoning: false to all Claude model aliases
